Frequently Asked Questions

What specialized services do you offer?+

We specialize in custom Software Development, AI/ML Integrations, Mobile App Development, E-Commerce, UX/UI Design, and SEO optimization to help brands achieve scalable growth.

Do you build custom AI models for specific industries?+

Yes. From predictive analytics in FinTech to healthcare compliance monitoring and custom enterprise chatbots, we train and integrate specialized AI models for your specific domain.

How long does a typical project take?+

A standard MVP (Minimum Viable Product) typically takes 4-8 weeks. Complex enterprise deployments or bespoke AI models may scale from 3-6 months depending on data readiness and architecture.

What is your typical technology stack?+

We are versatile, typically utilizing React, Next.js, or Vue for frontends; Node.js, Python, or Java for backends; and AWS or GCP for cloud infrastructure. For AI, we leverage PyTorch and TensorFlow alongside powerful LLM endpoints.

Can you take over existing codebases?+

Absolutely. We routinely evaluate, refactor, and stabilize legacy systems or transition them to modern, scalable microservice architectures seamlessly.

Book a strategy call to accelerate your growth.

A clear roadmap, expert consultation, and a flexible engagement for your vision.
